description.overview: Often confused with English Springers, the Welsh Springer is slightly smaller with a distinctive red and white coat. They're devoted family dogs.
description.history: The Welsh Springer Spaniel originated in Wales.
description.temperament: Known for being happy, loyal, active.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their straight, flat, silky coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

not_for: Those wanting an outgoing dog with strangers
verdict.summary: Often confused with English Springers, the Welsh Springer is slightly smaller with a distinctive red and white coat. They're devoted family dogs.
